top_signals.title: Iran war to dent passenger volumes, Heathrow warns
top_signals.summary: Heathrow has told its creditors the Iran war will dent passenger volumes at the west London hub in an update in which it also railed against plans for a new regulatory model being proposed by the aviation watchdog. In a bi-annual report aimed at its bondholders, Heathrow Airport Limited (HAL) said that despite the regional [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Corporate Bitcoin Treasuries Explained: Why Public Companies Hold Bitcoin
top_signals.summary: Public companies hold bitcoin because they view it as a scarce, dollar-denominated reserve asset that can diversify treasury holdings, preserve purchasing power against inflation, attract investors, and provide exposure to the digital asset economy. The model was pioneered by Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and has since been adopted by Tesla, Block, Metaplanet, and a range of […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: China Gives Coal Room to Grow in New Five-Year Energy Plan
top_signals.summary: China is leaving room for coal consumption to grow in coming years, as the stability of the world’s largest energy market continues to outweigh climate concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
